name: DimensionalModelBuilder

neutralConcepts: DR-62: SCD-2 version-only — close_old (write closure record) + open_new (new storeDocument)
NEVER use updateDocument for SCD-2 — always storeDocument for both close and open
effectiveFrom/effectiveTo on all dimension version records
Fact records via appendFact() — append-only, no updates

ironRules.rule: DR-62: SCD-2 MUST use close_old + open_new via storeDocument — never updateDocument.
All dimension version records MUST have effectiveFrom and effectiveTo.
Fact records are append-only — never update fact records.

keywords: dimensional model builder SCD-2 close old open new effectiveFrom effectiveTo fact append-only DR-62 DimensionVersionApplied no updateDocument
